entry.title: Underground
entry.summary:
Author: lulustars28

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,492Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 4

Summary: There is one name in Gotham's underground fighting circuit that strikes fear in all fighters: "Red Hood".Jason Todd is Roman Sionis golden fighter, who has made him millions. To Roman, Jason is nothing more than property and profit. The only reason Jason is Roman's lapdog is to win money to put food on the table for him and his younger brother, Tim. The money is never enough, but it keeps them alive. Walking away has never been an option. Because years ago, Jason made a promise to someone who never came back. A girl he met in stolen moments between worlds—someone who made him believe, briefly, that Gotham didn’t have to be loneliness and survival. Someone who promised she wouldn’t disappear like everyone else. Then she did. No goodbye. No explanation. No way to find her again. Jason buried the memory the only way he knew how: by assuming she had chosen to forget him. Now she’s back. After six years abroad, Roman Sionis’s daughter has finally returned to Gotham. Jason sees her as a traitor due to her broken promises. She sees him as another one of her father's thugs. But how long can their past stay buried under contempt, and how long can it be before old feelings begin to rise to the surface?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,430Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 28

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.title: Pretty Bird
entry.summary:
Author: locallilkiddo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,170Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 255

Summary: The five times a vigilante saved you, and the one time he didn’t. You work at the local diner in Park Row where anyone of any walks of life are allowed in, including the titular Red Hood. You keep bumping into him when you’re at your lowest, and he begins to remind you so much of your childhood hero, Robin.

entry.title: Something Borrowed, Something Bruised
entry.summary:
Author: CherryySunshine

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,560Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Red Hood and Moxie know each other well enough to fight back-to-back, but not well enough to know each other’s real names. When a criminal masquerade admits only married pairs, Jason asks her to play his wife for the night, and the line between cover and confession gets dangerously thin.

entry.title: Have you found it yet?
entry.summary:
Author: lixsznshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,342Chapters: 1/27Kudos: 4

Summary: There were many reasons to be sad in Gotham. First of all, because you have the misfortune of living in Gotham. In close second, the endless threat of whatever supercriminal that had decided today was the day the world ends. Third, it stinks. There were many reasons to hate your life if you lived in Gotham. You could breathe the wrong way and get stabbed, or god forbid you decide to carry some cash on you - you’d practically be walking into your own grave at that point. It seems you’ve failed at everything that you’ve tried in your life, including finding a reason to explain your never-ending sadness.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: LicoricexWitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,710Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 226

Summary: You've always been obsessed with superheroes, ever since you were a little kid. You moved to Gotham all alone with stars in your eyes for undergrad before the cold reality of city-living set in. The streets were mean and people weren't as kind as they were back home. It was hard to make friends and you preferred to stay inside, making you even lonelier. You were a regular fish out of water, not a lot of close friends or family, living all alone--the perfect target for someone with not-so-nice intentions. They always said not to meet your heroes because they could never live up to your expectations. Or sometimes, they weren't a hero at all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Eventually the colour red
entry.summary:
Author: Jaybird_0123

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,631Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 235

Summary: (I’m shit at summary’s but I swear my story’s good ish)Jason Todd is Robin and one of the biggest Cinderella story’s in Gotham, and you, well you’re just some crime alley kid. But so was Jason so on his first day of school( where he seems a bit to familiar) when he sees you getting bullied by a girl for the same reasons he always used to get bullied for he decides to befriend you and (while being hopelessly in love) protect you, as a friend of course, but when it develops into more he tries to help you and it spirals into misunderstandings and fear (they work it out) and a bunch of fluff , but How long can it go on like an annoyingly cute high school romance till everything turns to a bloody red mess.Not long apparently.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,023Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 93

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage
